sample_size.source_quote: The remaining 155 patients, representing 5.1% of all admissions to the ICU, were included in the analysis.

patient_age_mean.source_quote: The mean age of the patients who died was 27.1 years (SD=6.8), signiﬁcantly higher than the mean age of those who survived (23.6 years, SD=6.6) (P=.02).

sofa_score_baseline.source_quote: The median SOFA score at the time of diagnosis was 6 (interquartile range [IQR] 4–9.5) in the patients who died and 2 (IQR 0–5) in those who survived

icu_mortality_percent.source_quote: Twenty-two of the patients who developed sepsis died (14.2%)

mortality_predictors.source_quote: only urinary infection was identiﬁed as a protective factor against death in patients with sepsis (RR=0.26, 95% CI=0.08–0.85, P=.009)

mortality_predictors.predictor_variable: need for vasopressor drugs during hospitalization
mortality_predictors.source_quote: the need for vasopressor drugs during hospitalization (RR=17.32, 95% CI=4.20–71.36)

mortality_predictors.confounders_adjusted: hierarchical logistic regression adjusting for multiple variables
mortality_predictors.source_quote: After multiple logistic regression, only the need for vasopressors during hospitalization remained a risk factor associated with death (odds ratio [OR]=26.38; 95% CI=5.87–118.51).

mortality_predictors.predictor_variable: lactate levels >2 mmol/L at time of diagnosis
mortality_predictors.source_quote: lactate levels >2 at the time of diagnosis (RR=4.60, 95% CI=1.05–20.07)
